en: Legends tells of a legendary warrior . . .
whose kung-fu skills were the stuff of legend.
ko: 그의 쿵푸 실력은 전설 그 자체였다.

en: He traveled the land in search of worthy foes.
ko: 그는 맞설 만한 적을 찾아 온 세상을 떠돌았다.

en: I see you like to chew.
Maybe you should chew on my fists!
The warrior said nothing, for his mouth was full.
ko: 전사는 아무 말도 하지 않았다. 입에 음식이 가득했으니까.

en: Then he swallowed . . . and then he spoke.
Enough talk. Let's fight! Sha-baa-booeee!
He was so deadly, in fact, that his enemies would go blind from over-exposure to pure awesomeness!
ko: 사실 너무 강해서 적들이 순수한 멋짐에 과다 노출되어 눈이 멀 정도였다!

en: My eyes! He's too awesome! And attractive.
ko: 내 눈! 너무 멋져! 게다가 매력적이야.

en: How can we repay you?
There is no charge for awesomeness. Or attractiveness.
It mattered not how many foes he faced.
They were no match for his bodacity.
Never before had a panda been so feared . . . and so loved.
ko: 판다가 이토록 두려움과... 사랑을 동시에 받은 적은 없었다.

en: Even the most heroic heroes in all of China . . . the Furious 5 . . .
ko: 중국 전체에서 가장 영웅적인 영웅들... 분노의 5인방도...

en: bowed in respect to this great master.
We should hang-out. Agreed.
But hanging-out would have to wait . . .
'cause when you're facing the 10k Demons of Shebon Mountain . . .
ko: 쉬본 산의 만 마리 악마들 앞에 서면...

en: there's only one thing that matters . . . and that's . . . Po.
ko: 중요한 건 딱 하나뿐... 바로... 포.

en: Get up. You'll be late for work. What?
Po. Get up!
Hey Po . . . What are you doing up there?
ko: 야 포... 거기서 뭐 하는 거야?

en: Uh . . . Nothing.
Monkey, Mantis, Crane, Viper, Tigress . . .
Po . . . Let's go! You're late for work! Coming!
